mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (sender_id, sender_name, channel, content, server_id, create_time) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{channel}, #{content}, #{serverId}, #{createTime})

INSERT INTO chat_message (sender_id, sender_name, channel, content, server_id, create_time, target_id, nation_id, alliance_id) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{channel}, #{content}, #{serverId}, #{createTime}, #{targetId}, #{nationId}, #{allianceId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_id AS senderId, sender_name AS senderName, channel, content, create_time AS createTime, target_id AS targetId FROM chat_message WHERE channel = 'private' AND server_id = #{serverId} AND (sender_id = #{userId} OR target_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, sender_id AS senderId, sender_name AS senderName, channel, content, create_time AS createTime, target_id AS targetId FROM chat_message WHERE channel = 'private' AND server_id = #{serverId} AND ((sender_id = #{userId} AND target_id = #{targetId}) OR (sender_id = #{targetId} AND target_id = #{userId})) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN target_id ELSE sender_id END AS contactId, CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN sender_name ELSE (SELECT cm2.sender_name FROM chat_message cm2 WHERE cm2.sender_id = CASE WHEN chat_message.sender_id = #{userId} THEN chat_message.target_id ELSE chat_message.sender_id END ORDER BY cm2.create_time DESC LIMIT 1) END AS contactName, MAX(create_time) AS lastTime FROM chat_message WHERE channel = 'private' AND server_id = #{serverId} AND (sender_id = #{userId} OR target_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY contactId ORDER BY lastTime DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, title, content, type, create_time AS createTime FROM announcement WHERE enabled = 1 AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= #{now}) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= #{now}) ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, title, content, type, create_time AS createTime FROM announcement WHERE id = #{id}
